summary: Iteration 175: Tested Merged Forum Post indicators and Admin Merin Referral Code management. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped - no merged posts in DB to test merge_info). Frontend: All UI elements verified. Login works, Forum page loads with proper data-testids, Admin Members page shows Merin Referral Code input in view dialog edit mode.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 175 added: 1) Merged post indicator - 'Merged' tag (data-testid='merged-tag') appears near post title + merge-info-sidebar (data-testid='merge-info-sidebar') in aside when post.merged_from exists. merge_info object includes source_title, merged_at, comments_moved, merged_by_name from forum_merge_logs collection. No merged posts exist in test DB to verify live data. 2) Admin Merin code management - PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id} with merin_referral_code field updates user's code. View dialog edit mode has Merin Referral Code input (data-testid='view-edit-merin-code'). Edit dialog has edit-merin-code-input. Backend verified: code stored as uppercase, empty string clears field. Test member id=dark-theme-overhaul-4 has TESTCODE set.

forum_posts_list.notes: Returns posts array with total count

post_with_merged_from_has_merge_info.notes: No merged posts in DB to verify merge_info object

post_without_merged_from_no_merge_info.notes: Non-merged posts correctly have no merge_info

frontend_view_dialog_edit_merin_code.notes: data-testid='view-edit-merin-code' found in view dialog edit mode

code_review_notes.forum.py_lines_253-265: merge_info enrichment correctly queries forum_merge_logs when post.merged_from exists, returns source_title, source_post_id, merged_by_name, merged_at, comments_moved
code_review_notes.admin_routes.py_line_1091-1092: merin_referral_code update handler correctly strips and uppercases the value
code_review_notes.ForumPostPage.jsx_line_509: merged-tag badge with data-testid rendered when post.merged_from exists
code_review_notes.ForumPostPage.jsx_lines_791-813: merge-info-sidebar section with data-testid rendered when post.merge_info exists
